chive-sidebar-nav: Label at the top of the left sidebar.
chive-sidebar-collapse: Tooltip/aria-label for the sidebar toggle when sidebar is open (click will collapse it).
chive-sidebar-expand: Tooltip/aria-label for the sidebar toggle when sidebar is collapsed (click will expand it).
chive-section-upload: Heading for the file upload section in the sidebar.
chive-upload-main: Main text inside the drag-and-drop upload zone.
chive-upload-sub: Secondary text inside the upload zone. May contain basic HTML (br, strong).
chive-upload-loaded-main: Upload zone main text after files have been loaded.
chive-upload-loaded-sub: Upload zone secondary text after files have been loaded.
chive-section-files: Heading for the loaded files list section.
chive-no-files: Placeholder shown when no files are loaded.
chive-files-loaded: Summary of how many files are loaded. $1 = count. Uses PLURAL.
chive-file-meta: Metadata line for one file. $1 = row count, $2 = column count, $3 = file size.
chive-remove-file: Aria-label for the remove button. $1 = file name.
chive-section-columns: Heading for the column selection section.
chive-section-viz-manage: Heading for the sidebar section where user enables/disables charts and edits chart parameters.
chive-action-only-numeric: Quick-action button: select only numeric columns.
chive-action-only-text: Quick-action button: select only text columns.
chive-btn-advance: Primary sidebar button that opens visualization-management sidebar mode. Include the → glyph.
chive-btn-edit-columns: Button in visualization-management sidebar mode that returns to the column-selection sidebar mode.
chive-btn-go-panel: Button in visualization-management sidebar mode that switches to the panel tab/sidebar mode.
chive-empty-title: Heading in the main area when no file is loaded.
chive-card-preview: Title of the data preview card.
chive-tab-preview: Tab label that switches the main result area to the preview/statistics view.
chive-tab-charts: Tab label that switches the main result area to the chart visualizations view.
chive-tab-panel: Tab label that switches the main result area to the panel composer view.
chive-badge-preview: Badge in the preview card. $1 = total rows, $2 = rows shown, $3 = visible columns, $4 = total columns.
chive-no-columns-selected: Message inside the preview area when no columns are selected.
chive-card-charts: Title of the chart visualization card.
chive-charts-badge: Badge in chart card header. $1 = count of currently visible columns, $2 = count of visible numeric columns.
chive-chart-bar-title: Heading for the bar chart block.
chive-chart-scatter-title: Heading for the scatter plot block.
chive-chart-network-title: Heading for the network graph block.
chive-chart-pie-title: Heading for the pie/donut chart block.
chive-chart-control-axis-label-x: Label for checkbox control that toggles visibility of the X-axis label text for charts that support axes.
chive-chart-control-axis-label-y: Label for checkbox control that toggles visibility of the Y-axis label text for charts that support axes.
chive-chart-control-common-title: Label for text input control where users define a custom chart title rendered inside the SVG and reused in panel snapshots.
chive-chart-control-common-height: Label for slider control that sets chart rendering height in the visualizations tab.
chive-chart-control-bar-category: Label for the select control that chooses which column is used as bar-chart category.
chive-chart-control-bar-sort: Label for the select control that chooses bar-chart sorting mode.
chive-chart-control-bar-topn: Label for the select control that sets the category limit (top N) for the bar chart.
chive-chart-control-bar-color: Label for the color picker control that customizes bar chart fill color.
chive-chart-sort-count-desc: Sort option label: by count, descending.
chive-chart-sort-count-asc: Sort option label: by count, ascending.
chive-chart-sort-label-asc: Sort option label: by category label/name, ascending.
chive-chart-sort-label-desc: Sort option label: by category label/name, descending.
chive-chart-topn-all: Select option label for 'show all categories' in bar chart top-N control.
chive-chart-control-scatter-x: Label for the select control that chooses the X-axis column for scatter plot.
chive-chart-control-scatter-y: Label for the select control that chooses the Y-axis column for scatter plot.
chive-chart-control-scatter-xscale: Label for the select control that chooses linear/log scale for scatter X axis.
chive-chart-control-scatter-yscale: Label for the select control that chooses linear/log scale for scatter Y axis.
chive-chart-scale-linear: Option label for linear axis scale.
chive-chart-scale-log: Option label for logarithmic axis scale.
chive-chart-control-scatter-radius: Label for the select control that sets scatter plot point size.
chive-chart-control-scatter-opacity: Label for the select control that sets scatter plot point opacity.
chive-chart-control-scatter-color: Label for the color picker control that customizes scatter plot point color.
chive-chart-control-network-source: Label for select control that chooses source-node column for network graph links.
chive-chart-control-network-target: Label for select control that chooses target-node column for network graph links.
chive-chart-control-network-weight: Label for optional numeric select control used as link weight in network graph.
chive-chart-control-network-group: Label for optional select control used to color/group network nodes.
chive-chart-control-network-node-radius: Label for slider control that sets network node circle radius.
chive-chart-control-network-link-distanc: Label for slider control that sets preferred distance between linked nodes.
chive-chart-control-network-charge: Label for slider control that sets network force-charge strength.
chive-chart-control-network-link-opacity: Label for slider control that sets network link stroke opacity.
chive-chart-control-network-zoom: Label for slider control that sets initial network zoom scale.
chive-chart-control-network-alpha-decay: Label for slider control that sets simulation cooling speed (alpha decay) for network layout stabilization.
chive-chart-control-network-show-legend: Label for checkbox control that toggles the network group legend.
chive-chart-control-network-node-labels: Label for checkbox control that toggles text labels next to network nodes.
chive-chart-control-pie-category: Label for the select control that chooses which column is used as category in pie/donut chart.
chive-chart-control-pie-measure: Label for the select control that chooses whether pie sectors are based on row count or sum of numeric values.
chive-chart-control-pie-measure-count: Option label for pie measure mode that counts rows per category.
chive-chart-control-pie-measure-sum: Option label for pie measure mode that sums a selected numeric column per category.
chive-chart-control-pie-value-column: Label for the select control that picks the numeric column used when pie measure mode is set to sum.
chive-chart-control-pie-inner-radius: Label for the slider control that sets pie/donut inner radius (0 behaves like pie).
chive-chart-control-pie-outer-radius: Label for the slider control that sets pie/donut outer radius.
chive-chart-control-pie-pad-angle: Label for the slider control that defines angular spacing between sectors in the pie/donut chart.
chive-chart-control-pie-color: Label for the color picker control that sets pie/donut base color.
chive-chart-control-pie-sector-label: Label for checkbox control that toggles display of each sector category/name text.
chive-chart-control-pie-sector-value: Label for checkbox control that toggles display of each sector numeric value text.
chive-chart-control-pie-show-legend: Label for checkbox control that toggles pie/donut legend visibility.
chive-chart-control-pie-label-position: Label for the select control that chooses whether pie labels are drawn inside sectors or outside with connector lines.
chive-chart-control-pie-label-position-i: Option label for pie label placement inside sectors.
chive-chart-control-pie-label-position-o: Option label for pie label placement outside sectors with leader lines.
chive-chart-toggle-bar: Label for checkbox/toggle that enables or disables bar chart rendering.
chive-chart-toggle-scatter: Label for checkbox/toggle that enables or disables scatter plot rendering.
chive-chart-toggle-network: Label for checkbox/toggle that enables or disables network graph rendering.
chive-chart-toggle-pie: Label for checkbox/toggle that enables or disables pie/donut chart rendering.
chive-viz-bar-desc: Short helper description shown in the bar chart visualization card.
chive-viz-scatter-desc: Short helper description shown in the scatter plot visualization card.
chive-viz-network-desc: Short helper description shown in the network graph visualization card.
chive-viz-pie-desc: Short helper description shown in the pie/donut visualization card.
chive-viz-category-comparison: Small category badge label shown on visualization cards for comparison-style charts.
chive-viz-category-relationship: Small category badge label shown on visualization cards for relationship-style charts.
chive-viz-category-composition: Small category badge label shown on visualization cards for composition-style charts.
chive-viz-toggle-expand: Button label to expand a visualization card parameters section.
chive-viz-toggle-collapse: Button label to collapse a visualization card parameters section.
chive-chart-sidebar-empty: Message shown in visualization-management sidebar when there are no selected columns available.
chive-chart-option-none: Placeholder option text for chart selectors when nothing is selected.
chive-chart-empty-bar: Message shown when bar chart cannot be rendered due to missing suitable visible columns.
chive-chart-empty-scatter: Message shown when scatter chart cannot be rendered due to missing visible numeric columns.
chive-chart-empty-scatter-log: Message shown when scatter chart uses log scale and there are not enough positive values to plot.
chive-chart-empty-network: Message shown when network graph cannot be rendered due to missing/invalid source-target columns.
chive-chart-empty-pie: Message shown when pie/donut chart cannot be rendered due to missing suitable visible categorical column.
chive-chart-empty-pie-sum: Message shown when pie/donut chart is in sum mode but no suitable visible numeric value column is selected.
chive-chart-empty-none: Message shown in visualization tab when user disabled all charts.
chive-chart-disabled: Message shown in a chart slot when that chart was disabled from sidebar.
chive-chart-no-data: Message shown when a chart has no plottable rows after data cleaning/filtering.
chive-chart-actions-open: Tooltip/aria-label for the chart action menu button (kebab).
chive-chart-action-download-svg: Menu item label to download the rendered chart as an SVG file.
chive-chart-action-add-panel: Menu item label for adding the chart to a future panel feature.
chive-chart-action-add-panel-coming-soon: Temporary message shown when user clicks add-to-panel while feature is not implemented yet.
chive-chart-download-error: Error shown when SVG download fails because no chart SVG is available.
chive-section-panel-saved: Heading for the sidebar section listing charts saved to the panel.
chive-panel-sidebar-hint: Short helper text in panel sidebar explaining drag-and-drop from sidebar to slots.
chive-btn-back-viz: Button in panel sidebar that returns user to visualizations tab/sidebar.
chive-card-panel: Title of the panel composition card.
chive-panel-layout-label: Label for the panel layout selector.
chive-panel-borders-label: Label for checkbox that toggles stronger slot borders in panel canvas.
chive-panel-borders-color-label: Label for the color input that customizes slot border color.
chive-panel-layout-single: Option label for one-slot panel layout.
chive-panel-layout-2col: Option label for two-column panel layout.
chive-panel-layout-hero2: Option label for layout with one large slot and two smaller slots.
chive-panel-layout-3col: Option label for layout with three equal-width columns.
chive-panel-layout-1x2: Option label for layout with one slot above another.
chive-panel-export-svg: Button label to export the currently composed panel layout as SVG.
chive-panel-add-block: Button label that appends a new panel block to the canvas stack.
chive-panel-max-blocks: Error shown when user tries to add more than the maximum allowed blocks.
chive-panel-resize-handle: Aria-label for the guided drag handle used to resize panel block regions.
chive-panel-resize-block-height: Aria-label for the drag handle used to resize a full panel block height.
chive-panel-slot-empty: Placeholder text shown inside an empty panel slot.
chive-panel-clear-slot: Aria-label for button that clears one slot assignment.
chive-panel-remove-chart: Aria-label for button that removes one saved chart from panel sidebar.
chive-panel-empty-sidebar: Empty-state message when no charts have been added to panel sidebar yet.
chive-panel-add-error: Error shown when adding a chart snapshot to panel fails.
chive-panel-add-success: Success toast shown when a chart snapshot is added to panel.
chive-panel-export-error: Error shown when exporting current panel layout to SVG fails.
chive-tooltip-count: Tooltip label for bar-chart count value.
chive-tooltip-percentage: Tooltip label for bar-chart percentage value.
chive-tooltip-row: Tooltip label for scatter point source row index.
chive-stats-badge: Badge in the stats card. $1 = number of numeric columns. Uses PLURAL.
chive-stat-valid: Label for the count of non-null numeric values in a column.
chive-lang-label: Label for the language selector in the header.
chive-type-number: Display label for numeric columns (used in column list tags and table footer). Keep short.
chive-type-text: Display label for text columns (used in column list tags and table footer). Keep short.
chive-warn-large-file: Confirmation warning before parsing a large file. $1 = file name, $2 = current file size (formatted), $3 = recommended max size.
chive-warn-large-rows: Confirmation warning after parsing when row count is large. $1 = file name, $2 = parsed row count (formatted), $3 = recommended max row count (formatted).
chive-error-format: Error when user uploads an unsupported file type. $1 = file name.
chive-error-read: Error when the browser fails to read a file. $1 = file name.
chive-error-upload-processing: Fallback error shown when file upload processing fails and no specific message is available.
chive-error-upload-input-missing: Error shown when the hidden file input element is missing from the DOM during setup.
chive-error-upload-zone-missing: Error shown when the upload drop zone element is missing from the DOM during setup.
chive-error-internal: Fallback error message for unexpected internal application failures.
